channel.title: Distributed Transactions on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed Transactions on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Cosmos DB distributed transactions
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now has a public preview for distributed transactions. You can perform atomic operations across items and partitions, with all changes committed together or rolled back on failure.

  • Source: Azure Updates
